help.source: File or directory path relative to project root, e.g. .env, config/, uploads/
help.strategy: Sync strategy: overwrite = overwrite target each time, skip = skip if target exists, merge = .env key-by-key merge, directory recursive merge
help.skipIfMissing: true = silently skip if source missing, false = trigger rollback if source missing
help.run: Shell command to execute, e.g. bun install, npm run build
help.required: true = abort pipeline and rollback on failure
help.timeout: Timeout in milliseconds; SIGTERM sent to process after timeout
help.cwd: worktree = new working directory, project = project root
help.async: true = return immediately without waiting, run in background

resourceSyncDesc: After Worktree creation and before port allocation, copy specified files from the project root to the new working directory
hooksDesc: Execute shell commands at specific stages of the session lifecycle
portAllocationDesc: Define which port variables this project needs. Allocated to worktree and written to .env.
portAllocationFallback: If not configured, defaults to FRONTEND_PORT, BACKEND_PORT, WS_PORT, DEBUG_PORT, PREVIEW_PORT.
noPortsConfigured: No custom port variables configured. Will use default 5 ports.
portKeyPlaceholder: Enter port variable name e.g. METRICS_PORT, press Enter to add
configFileNotFound: ⚠️ Config file does not exist, it will be created after saving
